custom.title: Custom Tools
custom.description: Manage custom shell-based tools for agents
custom.emptyDescription: Create your first custom tool to get started.

delete.title: Delete Custom Tool
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

form.name: Name *
form.nameHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
form.commandHint: Shell template. Use {{.key}} for parameter placeholders.

errors.nameSlug: Name must be a valid slug (lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only)

builtin.title: Built-in Tools
builtin.description: Manage system built-in tools. Enable/disable or configure settings globally.
builtin.emptyDescription: No built-in tools have been seeded yet.
builtin.deprecatedTooltip: This tool has been deprecated and is no longer available

settingsDialog.title: Settings — {{name}}
settingsDialog.noFields: No configurable settings for this tool.

jsonDialog.title: Settings: {{name}}
jsonDialog.description: Edit tool-specific settings as JSON. Changes take effect immediately after saving.

kgSettings.title: Knowledge Graph Settings
kgSettings.description: Configure entity extraction from memory writes. Requires a provider/model capable of structured JSON output.
kgSettings.providerTip: LLM provider used to extract entities and relations from text.
kgSettings.modelTip: Model ID for extraction. Should support structured JSON output.
kgSettings.minConfidenceHint: Entities below this confidence score are discarded (0.0–1.0).
kgSettings.autoExtractHint: Automatically extract entities when agents write to memory files.

mediaChain.description: Configure and order provider fallbacks. Drag to reorder — the first enabled provider is tried first.
mediaChain.noProviders: No providers configured. Add one below.

descriptions.read_file: Read the contents of a file from the agent's workspace by path
descriptions.write_file: Write content to a file in the workspace, creating directories as needed
descriptions.list_files: List files and directories in a given path within the workspace
descriptions.edit: Apply targeted search-and-replace edits to existing files without rewriting the entire file
descriptions.exec: Execute a shell command in the workspace and return stdout/stderr
descriptions.web_search: Search the web for information using a search engine (Brave or DuckDuckGo)
descriptions.web_fetch: Fetch a web page or API endpoint and extract its text content
descriptions.memory_search: Search through the agent's long-term memory using semantic similarity
descriptions.memory_get: Retrieve a specific memory document by its file path
descriptions.knowledge_graph_search: Search entities, relationships, and observations in the agent's knowledge graph
descriptions.read_image: Analyze images using a vision-capable LLM provider
descriptions.read_document: Analyze documents (PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, CSV, etc.) using a document-capable LLM provider
descriptions.create_image: Generate images from text prompts using an image generation provider
descriptions.read_audio: Analyze audio files (speech, music, sounds) using an audio-capable LLM provider
descriptions.read_video: Analyze video files using a video-capable LLM provider
descriptions.create_video: Generate videos from text descriptions using AI
descriptions.create_audio: Generate music or sound effects from text descriptions using AI
descriptions.tts: Convert text to natural-sounding speech audio
descriptions.browser: Automate browser interactions: navigate pages, click elements, fill forms, take screenshots
descriptions.sessions_list: List active chat sessions across all channels
descriptions.session_status: Get the current status and metadata of a specific chat session
descriptions.sessions_history: Retrieve the message history of a specific chat session
descriptions.sessions_send: Send a message to an active chat session on behalf of the agent
descriptions.message: Send a proactive message to a user on a connected channel (Telegram, Discord, etc.)
descriptions.cron: Schedule or manage recurring tasks using cron expressions, at-times, or intervals
descriptions.spawn: Spawn a subagent to handle a task in the background
descriptions.skill_search: Search for available skills by keyword or description to find relevant capabilities
descriptions.use_skill: Activate a skill to use its specialized capabilities (tracing marker)
descriptions.team_tasks: View, create, update, and complete tasks on the team task board
descriptions.team_message: Send a direct message or broadcast to teammates in the agent team
